title: Air Wick Stacey Solomon Garden Glow 80ml Reed Diffuser, Natural Essential Oils, 6 weeks of Long-Lasting Fragrance, Eco-Friendly, Recyclable, Sustainable Fragrance, Aromatic Decor, Freshener.
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

CREATE A WELCOMING ATMOSPHERE: Garden glow is a sophisticated scent of wild jasmine and frangipani flowers fused with notes of spiced cinnamon creates an atmosphere of welcoming warmth. It invokes soothing warmth and floral fragrance throughout your home.

INFUSED WITH ESSENTIAL OILS: Surround yourself in the inviting scents of our nature-inspired fragrances, infused with natural essential oils which neutralise malodours in the kitchen, bathroom and living room
NATURE INSPIRED: Airwick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long-lasting fragrance and improve your home fragrance for up to 6 weeks
LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE FOR UP TO 6 WEEKS: Scented liquid included in bottle lasts up to six weeks
Available in other fragrances. Recycle when empty
description: Ingredients CONTAINS; (2-methoxymethylethoxy) propanol, 2,2-dimethyl-1,3-dioxolan4-ylmethanol, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, EUGENOL, 2,4-DIMETHYL3-CYCLOHEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE, D_LIMONENE, BENZYL SALICYLATE, 1- (1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8-octahydro2,3,8,8-tetramethyl2-naphthyl)ethan-1-one, DELTA-DAMASCONE, Ethanone, 1-(3-methyl2-benzofuranyl)-, ROSE KETONE-4, METHYL OCTINE CARBONATE Directions Insert the reeds into the bottle containing the scented liquid to disperse the fragrance. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Keep out of reach of children and pets. See more
